name: Baked Polenta W/Italian Sausage, Mushrooms & Three Cheeses
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Red sweet pepper; cored and seeded
1/2 pound Mild Italian sausage (with fennel seed and garlic); casing removed
1/2 pound Fresh mushrooms; trimmed and thinly sliced
1/2 cup Shredded Gruyere cheese OR other Swiss cheese
Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large, heavy saucepan, combine the milk or broth with the cornmeal over moderately high heat.
2. Slowly stir in the cornmeal while whisking briskly to prevent lumps.
3. Bring to a boil and cook for 10 minutes until very thick and smooth, stirring constantly.
4. Remove from heat and stir in the sage, cayenne pepper, ricotta, Gruyere (or other Swiss cheese), and season with salt and pepper.
5. Stir in the sausage and red pepper mixture until well combined.
6. Spoon the polenta into two 9-inch pie plates lined with plastic wrap.
7. Cover and refrigerate for at least an hour, or up to three days.
8. When ready to serve, preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
9. Cut the cooled polenta into wedges and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
10. Drizzle with melted butter and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
11. Bake for 15-20 minutes until lightly browned and hot throughout.
12. Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and herb sprigs before serving with Fresh Tomato Sauce.
